issues.description: Condition checks for Character with 8000+ base power on board, but effect text describes a hand cost reduction (−3 cost). This should be a separate static effect, not an OnPlay trigger.
Condition should check LeaderHasType or LeaderIsName, not HasCardOnBoard. The effect requires Leader to have {Red-Haired Pirates} type OR be [Uta].

Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text states 'until the end of your opponent's next End Phase', which means the buff persists through opponent's turn. Should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' or similar extended duration.
